title: ASK query with JSON output - missing procedure
description:
When running following query from ISQL
SPARQL define output:format "JSON"
ASK {}

the following error occurs
SQLState: 42001

Message: SR185: Undefined procedure DB.DBA.RDF_FORMAT_BOOL_RESULT_AS_JSON.

I investigated the error inside source code and find out that the definition of DB.DBA.RDF_FORMAT_BOOL_RESULT_AS_JSON really does not exist, but it should.
Compiled from commit 79ce054 on MacOS 12.2.1.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test Name');
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_table);
UPDATE test_table SET name = NULL WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: ASK query with JSON output format definition missing
